name: The New Washington State Bank
description_short: The New Washington State Bank is a regional community bank operating 11 branches across Indiana, offering personal and business banking services including checking, savings, loans, and merchant services.
description_long:
The New Washington State Bank (NWSB) is a community-focused regional bank headquartered in Indiana with a physical presence across multiple counties in the state. The bank emphasizes accessibility and personalized service with the tagline "Banking the way you want" and maintains 11 branch locations across communities including New Washington, Henryville, Charlestown, Borden, Jeffersonville, Sellersburg, Scottsburg, New Albany, and Floyds Knobs.

NWSB offers a comprehensive suite of banking products designed for both personal and business customers. Personal services include checking and savings accounts, the Kickstart student checking account with debit card, mobile banking, Tap to Pay card technology, and a rewards program powered by BaZing. The bank also provides personal lending, home loans, CDs/IRAs, and financial calculators. For business customers, NWSB offers merchant payment services, treasury management services, and business accounts.

The bank distinguishes itself through modern digital features like mobile banking and Tap to Pay cards, combined with traditional branch accessibility across multiple Indiana communities. They emphasize fraud protection and security awareness, with dedicated sections on lost/stolen card procedures and warnings about email security. The addition of the Floyds Knobs branch location (recently opened) shows ongoing expansion efforts to serve new markets.

As a regional community bank, NWSB serves customers who prioritize local branch access and personalized service over national banking chains. However, the website provides limited information about specific rates, fees, account minimums, or detailed product terms. Customers should contact their local branch directly for detailed information about APY rates, lending rates, and account fees before opening accounts.
pros: 11 physical branch locations across Indiana providing local community presence and in-person service
Mobile banking app available for convenient account management on-the-go
Tap to Pay card technology for contactless payments
BaZing Rewards program for earning rewards on transactions
Kickstart student checking account with debit card specifically designed for students
Merchant payment services and treasury management for small business needs
Fraud protection and lost/stolen card procedures with dedicated support
cons: Website lacks specific information about APY rates, APR on loans, or account fees, requiring customers to contact branches directly
Limited service area restricted to Indiana with only 11 branches, unsuitable for customers needing nationwide presence
No information provided about minimum balance requirements, overdraft fees, or other account specifics on the website

contact.address: 402 E Main St, New Washington, IN 47162

best_for: Indiana residents seeking community banking with local branch access and personalized service
Small business owners needing merchant payment services and treasury management in the Indiana region
Students looking for a dedicated checking account product with debit card access
diagnosis: The New Washington State Bank is best for Indiana residents and small business owners who value local branch relationships and personalized community banking service. The main caveat is the lack of transparent pricing information on the website—customers must contact branches directly to compare rates and fees with other financial institutions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 402 E Main St, New Washington, IN 47162
